subject: docs: update SESSION_NOTES, HISTORY, CLAUDE.md with Phases 3-7
body:
Documentation was updated in Phase 2 before Phases 3-7 completed.
This adds the missing entries for security hardening (CSP, maxLength),
debug log additions, UX/mobile fixes (touch targets, back button,
dropdown height), code quality (loading race, MODAL_TOP_MARGIN),
and performance (GeoJSON memo, shared skeleton animation, compound
filter debounce).

Tags: documentation
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: audit-sweep
Semver: patch
